name: construction project managers managing 5–15 subcontractors tool
description: For construction project managers managing 5–15 subcontractors, license expirations cause project delays. We provide automated alerts instead of manual tracking of licenses and expirations.
problem_solved: Subcontractor license expirations lead to project delays.
features: manual entry of subcontractor license details
